action.description: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?

context.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?
context.anomaly_observed: The packet includes a bank-change alert, a vendor-master form, a callback record, and a payment-release authority.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Payment PAY-QUA-071 releases USD 73400 to Quanta Field Services account ending 8821 on 2026-06-28.
Bank-change alert remains visible for Quanta Field Services because the account changed this week.
Callback CALL-QUA-071 used the pre-change vendor master phone source and confirmed account ending 8821 for Quanta Field Services.
Vendor-master approval VM-QUA-071 approves account ending 8821 for Quanta Field Services.
Bank ownership BANK-QUA-071 confirms account ending 8821 is owned by Quanta Field Services.
Payment-release authority REL-QUA-071 approves Quanta Field Services, USD 73400, account ending 8821, release date 2026-06-28 before payment.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Payment after bank update is complete when the evidence chain collectively supplies: pre-change callback source, vendor-master account approval, bank ownership validation, and payment-release authority matching vendor, amount, account, and release date before payment. No single record must carry every field if the chain closes all four gates.
